description: A metaprogramming block evaluated late in the compiler pipeline (after Semantic Analysis). It can inspect the resolved symbol table and inject or modify code based on the actual program state.
features: Evaluated at compile-time (late phase, after Semantic Analysis).
Can check if a variable, class, or function actually exists in the semantic scope.
Can perform reflection-like tasks and conditionally compile ALIR code based on types and definitions.
constraints: Runs after semantic analysis; injected code bypasses early semantic checks, so it's mainly used for ALIR generation rules or late-stage validations.
